name: DuckDuckGo
short: A duckduckgo search cog with image support
description: This searches duckduckgo and fetches results using web scraping. The reverse search uses Yandex.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store any data or metadata about users.
install_msg:
Shoutout to siu3334 for making half the commands (autofill, doodle) lulz
Fixator helped me so much, with the query url and in many many other things.
